name: weighted reduction of top-k expert outputs
preconditions: w may be None (plain sum, in-stack case)

numerics.notes: Accumulate the top-k sum in fp32; cast back to y.dtype. fp32 atol is 1e-4 (not 1e-6): the weighted top-k sum cancels to near-zero for some (m,h) (mixed-sign expert partials), where the reference's torch.sum tree reduction and the Triton kernel's sequential k-loop diverge by a few e-6 abs (a correct-vs-correct fp32 reduction-order difference); the previous atol=1e-6 rejected that floor (issue #82).
